Tory Aggeler
Senior Precious Metals Advisor
An Advisor Of
McAlvany
Precious Metals · Since 1972

For more than five decades, McAlvany Precious Metals has guided investors through every kind of market — building one of the most respected names in the physical metals industry.

Working with Tory means you have the institutional resources of a fifty-year firm behind every transaction: deep research, established vault and custodian relationships, fair pricing, and a standard of care that comes from a family-built business serving tens of thousands of clients.

You get the dedicated attention of a personal advisor — and the backing of a firm trusted across generations.

50+
Years in Business
Family-built and family-led since 1972, through every market cycle.
50k+
Clients Served
Decades of relationships across investors, families, and institutions.
A+
BBB Rating
An unblemished record built on transparency and accountability.
16
Senior Advisors
A bench of specialists, research analysts, and operations staff supporting every client.
What Tory Does

Personal guidance, institutional discipline.

From first conversation to long-term portfolio management, Tory and the McAlvany team handle every detail of precious metals ownership.

◆
Physical Delivery
Coins and bars delivered discreetly to your door, or held in segregated vault storage with your name on the metal.
Learn More
◇
IRA Placement
Move existing retirement accounts into physical metals — Tory and the team handle paperwork, custodian coordination, and storage.
Learn More
◈
Portfolio Strategy
Ongoing guidance on allocation, ratio trading between gold and silver, and rebalancing as macro conditions change.
Learn More
View All Services
The Team

Real people, real relationships.

When you work with Tory, you get a full team. Every member here supports your experience from first call to long-term portfolio management.

Senior Precious Metals Advisor
Tory Aggeler
Tory manages and advises on physical precious metals portfolios — delivery, storage, and IRA placement. He specializes in estate liquidations, trust accounts, and long-term portfolio strategy. Always available for a direct conversation.
Portfolio Strategy IRA Placement Estate Liquidation
Client Services Manager
Deanna Kuchler
Deanna is your first point of contact. She manages storage accounts, coordinates shipments, provides trade records, and delivers regular portfolio valuations. She answers your calls and makes everything run smoothly.
Storage Accounts Shipment Tracking Valuations
Assistant Advisor
Aidan Aggeler
Aidan works alongside Tory to support clients across every aspect of precious metals ownership — from first-time buyers learning the basics to longtime clients managing complex portfolios. Full bio coming soon.
Client Support Education

Institutional-grade research, for every client.

Know before you invest.
